title: dianthus zangezuricus
intro: Dianthus zangezuricus, also known as the Zangezur carnation, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family, native to the mountainous regions of Armenia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Dianthus zangezuricus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of Dianthus zangezuricus, such as infusions and decoctions, have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
